title: Fable 5.0: Mythos Power for Builders - But Is It Ready? #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof reviews Fable 5.0 and compares its capabilities to Claude Opus 4.8, questioning whether it is ready for builders. The video explores Fable 5.0's potential for detecting malicious activities.
writeup: Cyril Imhof reviews Fable 5.0 and weighs whether it is ready for builders, comparing it against Claude Opus 4.8. The short focuses on Fable 5.0's capacity for detecting malicious activity, framed around vulnerability detection. The central question is readiness: whether the model's capabilities hold up for practical building work rather than demonstrations.
